ticket.subject: Can't use/select Postnord Mypack Collect anymore
ticket.raw_subject: Can't use/select Postnord Mypack Collect anymore
ticket.description:
Hi,

We can't use/select Postnord Mypack Collect anymore. For new orders e.g., order #172 just says: "FAILURE Contact support", the request body is empty (NA). Have you changed the mapping for it? Is it called something else now?

Best,

Oscar

Hi Oscar,

Once we have your confirmation, we'll be happy to take a closer look and update you with our findings.

Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hi Oscar,

Thank you for your patience.

Could you please check whether you are able to generate the label directly through the PostNord portal using the same shipment details, including the service, weight, order value, and recipient address?

If the label can be generated successfully on the PostNord portal with the exact same details, please let us know. This information will help us narrow down the cause and investigate it further from our end.

We look forward to your update.

Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
L3: https://pluginhive.slack.com/archives/C02E15X8X0C/p1781268364905649

BigCommerce MCSL customer from Sweden using PostNord is unable to generate a label for Order #172.

- The rates are not displayed on the Order Summary page, and as a result, the customer is unable to generate the label.
- The customer is currently using the old UI.
- We asked the customer to verify the shipment directly in the PostNord portal using the same shipment details, and they confirmed that they are able to see the service and generate the shipment there.

Troubleshooting performed:

- Updated automation rules.
- Modified package dimensions
- Attempted label generation multiple times, but the issue persists.

The customer has explicitly provided permission for us to test and generate labels for Order #172.

Could you please investigate why the rates are not being returned in the Order Summary page and why the label generation is failing for this order?

Store URL: https://store-5yrznpmrvr.mybigcommerce.com
AC ID: adf8f225-b8fd-4d51-965d-da7d73cab95b

comments.body:
I can see that **Order #172**, as well as all other international orders in the app, has an `order.total` value of **0**.
We would like to understand why the total amount is being returned as `0`. Could you please check whether any discounts or adjustments have been applied to these orders?
If needed, please ask the customer to provide live store access so we can investigate further. Alternatively, please check with the customer to understand why the `order.total` value is `0` for all of these orders.
-[Athul]
comments.html_body:
I can see that Order #172, as well as all other international orders in the app, has an order.total value of 0.
We would like to understand why the total amount is being returned as 0. Could you please check whether any discounts or adjustments have been applied to these orders? 
If needed, please ask the customer to provide live store access so we can investigate further. Alternatively, please check with the customer to understand why the order.total value is 0 for all of these orders.

comments.body:
Hi Oscar,

Thank you for your patience while we investigated this with our technical team.

Upon reviewing the order data, we noticed that Order #172, as well as several other international orders, has an order total value of 0 being returned to our app.

Could you please help us understand why the order total is showing as 0? For example, have any discounts, adjustments, customizations, or other modifications been applied to these orders that could be affecting the order value?

Additionally, if you are comfortable doing so, could you provide us with access to the live store so that we can investigate this further? This may help us identify the root cause more quickly.
We look forward to your response and will continue investigating as soon as we have this information.

Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hi Oscar,
 
Thank you for your patience while we investigated this with our technical team.
 
Upon reviewing the order data, we noticed that Order #172, as well as several other international orders, has an order total value of 0 being returned to our app.
 
Could you please help us understand why the order total is showing as 0? For example, have any discounts, adjustments, customizations, or other modifications been applied to these orders that could be affecting the order value?
 
Additionally, if you are comfortable doing so, could you provide us with access to the live store so that we can investigate this further? This may help us identify the root cause more quickly.
We look forward to your response and will continue investigating as soon as we have this information.
 
Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
We have identified the root cause of the issue. There is a currency conversion problem occurring while processing rates from SEK to EUR when the order total is 0.
We are working on a fix and plan to include it in an upcoming release.
As a temporary workaround, could you please ask the customer to change the currency setting in General Settings to **Order Currency**? This should prevent the issue from occurring until the fix is deployed.(Please verify once this case before communicating it to the customer.)
-[Athul]
comments.html_body:
We have identified the root cause of the issue. There is a currency conversion problem occurring while processing rates from SEK to EUR when the order total is 0.
We are working on a fix and plan to include it in an upcoming release.
As a temporary workaround, could you please ask the customer to change the currency setting in General Settings to Order Currency? This should prevent the issue from occurring until the fix is deployed.(Please verify once this case before communicating it to the customer.)
-[Athul]

comments.body:
Hello Oscar Goldring,

Thank you for your patience.

Our team has checked your case and they have identified the root cause of the case. There is a currency conversion problem occurring while processing rates from SEK to EUR when the order total is 0.

We will be providing a fix for this case and tentatively it will be made available in the next release.

As a temporary workaround, you can update the **Preferred Shipment Currency** as **Order Currency** in App Settings > General Settings > Shipping. This will prevent the case from occuring and you should be able to generate the label for the orders with the app as usual.

For now, I have updated the setting in the app on your store and now the orders 171 and 172 are in Processing Status in the app.

Please check and let us know if you have any further queries.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Oscar Goldring,
 
Thank you for your patience.
 
Our team has checked your case and they have identified the root cause of the case. There is a currency conversion problem occurring while processing rates from SEK to EUR when the order total is 0.
 
We will be providing a fix for this case and tentatively it will be made available in the next release.
 
As a temporary workaround, you can update the Preferred Shipment Currency as Order Currency in App Settings > General Settings > Shipping. This will prevent the case from occuring and you should be able to generate the label for the orders with the app as usual.
 
For now, I have updated the setting in the app on your store and now the orders 171 and 172 are in Processing Status in the app.
 
Please check and let us know if you have any further queries.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
